3097010.name: X Simulator Drone
3097010.description: Dive into the ultimate drone simulation experience with our state-of-the-art game built on Unreal Engine 5. Choose between two advanced drones, each offering a unique level of difficulty—one designed for easy handling and the other for a more challenging flight. Explore meticulously crafted maps with breathtaking visuals and switch between different perspectives, including a fully controllable drone camera for an authentic first-person view. Perfect for both novice and experienced pilots, our next-gen simulator provides an unmatched level of detail and immersion. Master your piloting skills and see the world from a whole new perspective.
3097010.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 韩语, 俄语, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语, 日语
